'''ngajongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatique|pneumatique]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatique|pneumatique]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngajongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjengeth|ngæjengeth]] || [[word:ngæjengej|ngæjengej]] || [[word:ngæjengesh|ngæjengesh]] || [[word:ngæjenge|ngæjenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajojongoth|ngajojongoth]] || [[word:ngajojongoj|ngajojongoj]] || [[word:ngajojongosh|ngajojongosh]] || [[word:ngajojongo|ngajojongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajongoth|ngajongoth]] || [[word:ngajongoj|ngajongoj]] || [[word:ngajongosh|ngajongosh]] || [[word:ngajongo|ngajongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajofngoth|ngajofngoth]] || [[word:ngajofngoj|ngajofngoj]] || [[word:ngajofngosh|ngajofngosh]] || [[word:ngajofngof|ngajofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajongotho|ngajongotho]] || [[word:ngajongojo|ngajongojo]] || [[word:ngajongosho|ngajongosho]] || [[word:ngajongoko|ngajongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajongoth|ngajongoth]] || [[word:ngajongoj|ngajongoj]] || [[word:ngajongosh|ngajongosh]] || [[word:ngajongo|ngajongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajongothol|ngajongothol]] || [[word:ngajongojol|ngajongojol]] || [[word:ngajongoshol|ngajongoshol]] || [[word:ngajongokol|ngajongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajongothotho|ngajongothotho]] || [[word:ngajongojojo|ngajongojojo]] || [[word:ngajongoshosho|ngajongoshosho]] || [[word:ngajongoko|ngajongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajongothon|ngajongothon]] || [[word:ngajongojon|ngajongojon]] || [[word:ngajongoshon|ngajongoshon]] || [[word:ngajongokon|ngajongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajongothoro|ngajongothoro]] || [[word:ngajongojoro|ngajongojoro]] || [[word:ngajongoshoro|ngajongoshoro]] || [[word:ngajongokoro|ngajongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
